parameters.query:
UPDATE qc_checks
   SET items = (
     SELECT jsonb_agg(
       CASE WHEN it->>'id' = $2
         THEN jsonb_set(jsonb_set(jsonb_set(jsonb_set(it,
                  '{status}',       to_jsonb($3::text)),
                  '{evidence_url}', COALESCE(to_jsonb(NULLIF($4,'')), 'null'::jsonb)),
                  '{comment}',      COALESCE(to_jsonb(NULLIF($5,'')), 'null'::jsonb)),
                  '{checked_at}',   to_jsonb(now()::text))
         ELSE it
       END
     )
     FROM jsonb_array_elements(items) it
   )
 WHERE id = $1::uuid
RETURNING id, project_id, phase_key, status,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM jsonb_array_elements(items) it WHERE it->>'status'='pass') AS passed,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM jsonb_array_elements(items) it WHERE it->>'status'='fail') AS failed,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM jsonb_array_elements(items) it WHERE it->>'status'='pending') AS pending;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({status:'updated', qc_id: $json.id, phase_key: $json.phase_key, checklist_status: $json.status, item_id: $('Validate').first().json.item_id, item_status: $('Validate').first().json.status, summary: { passed: $json.passed, failed: $json.failed, pending: $json.pending } }) }}
